segments.text: Alright, here's game one, and now Spargo's going with Piranha Plant, right?
segments.original_text: Pero bueno, aquí es la primera partida, ahora con la planta de Spargo, ¿eh?

segments.text: There we go, that's it, Spargo on Piranha Plant - oh man!
segments.original_text: Ahí es, eso es, vamos a tener la planta de Spargo, ¡qué madre mía!

segments.text: I think this is going to be really fun to watch
segments.original_text: Me parece que va a ser muy divertido

segments.text: I mean, just to start off, seeing a Piranha Plant in 2025 seems...
segments.original_text: Es que para empezar, ver una planta piraña en 2025 me parece...

full_text: Alright, here's game one, and now Spargo's going with Piranha Plant, right? There we go, that's it, Spargo on Piranha Plant - oh man! I think this is going to be really fun to watch I mean, just to start off, seeing a Piranha Plant in 2025 seems...
